As a account operator
I want uploaded meeting documents parsed through an AI endpoint
So that notes, decisions, and actions can be extracted into the workspace

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Document uploads can call a serverless parse endpoint.
- [ ] The parse endpoint returns structured meeting data for downstream review.

Notes: The endpoint and caller exist; correctness depends on AI output and was not independently verified.
